a:r.a:t: Sales Director | External Compensation Plan Assessment
Director-level market plans are primarily driven by top-line profitability, with limited emphasis on team-level performance, whereas HGV plans places 10% on broad regional performance.

Based on expert interviews, aligning both Sales and Marketing Director compensation to overall revenue and profitability can help mitigate tension between functions by unifying incentives around shared top-line growth objectives.
Similar to the manager plans, HGV has only one level of acceleration after target performance, where 2 levels are common in the market.
Total Compensation Range (i.e., Leverage / Actual potential earnings)
Accelerators at typically 115% and 130% of performance (levels of payout not specified)
Monthly, Quarterly, and Annual payouts tied to site profits
Directors submit requests for approval by documented personnel to implement SPIFFs, Short-Term incentives, Contests, or Prize Drawings
N/A – SPIFFs more commonly used for lower levels
*Represents actual earnings data from 1/1/2025 through 12/31/2025, however does not represent mid-year job changes, and therefore might not be accurate for every employee
Where HGV Varies from the Market
